And yeah, just a quick performance review.
We're kind of in that holding pattern, but, you know, we'll break out of it once we clear the queue.
So, yeah.
Okay.
All right.
Thanks, everyone.
Thank you.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Resolve the content review bottleneck to unblock production.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Review Bottleneck:** A 39-article backlog exists, driven by slow reviews. The goal is to clear \~15 articles/week to catch up.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** Reviewers will be tagged in the Airtable `Rapyd Internal Reviewer` column, triggering email notifications with direct links to the content.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Articles are being rejected for flawed comparisons (e.g., PayFac vs. Marketplace) that damage credibility. A new process will balance SEO needs with technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Process Ownership:** Rapyd will define a reviewer-to-topic mapping to enable GrowthX to tag reviewers directly, streamlining the assignment process.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** A 39-article backlog exists, driven by slow reviews. The goal is to clear \~15 articles/week to catch up.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Reviewers are not receiving notifications, as they are only mentioned in Airtable comments instead of being tagged as users.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**New Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Action:** Tag reviewers in the `Rapyd Internal Reviewer` column.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This triggers an email notification with a direct link to the content, improving visibility and reducing manual checks.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**Reinforcement:** GrowthX will also tag reviewers in the external Slack channel to provide an additional reminder.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Defining Reviewer Assignments

  - [**Challenge:** Rapyd's team prefers Monday.com, creating resistance to using Airtable for review tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Assign reviewers by topic cluster, allowing GrowthX to tag them automatically.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [**Reviewer Tiers (by technical complexity):**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**Low:** Lizzie, Coral](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**Mid:** Vanessa, Nicolette](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
      - [**High:** Solutions Team (for infrastructure, API, and regulatory topics)](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Content Quality & Accuracy

  - [**Problem:** Articles are being rejected ("Hold" status) for flawed comparisons that damage credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
  - [**Example: "PayFac vs. Marketplace" Article**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Flawed Premise:** The article treated PayFac and Marketplace as competing models.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Technical Reality:** A Marketplace can *become* a PayFac to simplify seller onboarding and capture transaction fees. They are complementary, not mutually exclusive.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
      - [**SEO Rationale:** The "vs." structure was used to match competitor articles (e.g., Stripe) and satisfy Google's algorithm.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [**New Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [**Test Case:** The "PayFac vs. Marketplace" article will be rewritten to balance SEO needs with technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Frame the section as "PayFacs and the Marketplace Model," explaining the symbiotic relationship to build trust.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [**Other Rejection Patterns:**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Terminology Confusion:** Mixing up "settlements" (money to merchant) and "payouts" (merchant sending money).](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
      - [**Redundant Comparisons:** Treating "merchant processing" and "payment processing" as distinct concepts when they are interchangeable terms.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rapyd Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
      - [Define and send the reviewer-to-topic cluster mapping to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
      - [Begin using the `Rapyd Internal Reviewer` column in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the scrunch queries.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [Use the "PayFac vs. Marketplace" article as a test case for the new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
      - [Analyze "Hold" articles to identify and address recurring quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [Schedule the audience deep-dive and jobs-to-be-done workshop with George.](https://fathom.video/share/YgMnR587xsGpjEtpdfimpAGGNA1Xg8Bs?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

Add GrowthX to Monday dashboard if Airtable tagging fails
Confirm Solutions Team reviewers; ask Kristen/Coral to tag Nicolette
Email Mark re: Monday review compliance
Revise PayFac vs Marketplace article; share w/ Mark for approval
Tag George in external Slack; schedule audience deep dive + JTBD workshop via email
Review 'Hold' articles; propose terminology list if needed
Send topic-cluster→reviewer mapping to GrowthX; then GrowthX pre-tags in Airtable
